title: T-013 — Register DSL rule closed_production_strict_v1
prompt:
# T-013 — Register DSL rule closed_production_strict_v1

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §10.3, §6 D3 (Phase D #17)

## Goal
Register closed_production_strict_v1 gate rule per §10.3 verbatim in 02-SETTINGS rule_registry: trigger wo.transition.in_progress_to_completed, evaluation steps (check_all_components_consumed tolerance 0.02, check_all_outputs_registered, decide), pass_with_override if production_manager.

## Implementation contract
Create packages/dsl-rules/rules/production/closed-production-strict-v1.yaml with §10.3 spec. Update load-production-rules.ts to also register this rule. Add unit test asserting tolerance=0.02, override role='production_manager', three evaluation steps in order.

## Files (scope)
- packages/dsl-rules/rules/production/closed-production-strict-v1.yaml [create]
- packages/dsl-rules/src/registry/load-production-rules.ts [modify]
- packages/dsl-rules/src/__tests__/closed-production-strict-v1.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given loader runs, when rule_registry queried for closed_production_strict_v1, then row exists with version='v1' active=true and tolerance=0.02 in step check_all_components_consumed
2. Given rule loaded, when decide.rules parsed, then 'pass_with_override' requires override_by.role == 'production_manager'
3. Given rule loaded, when triggers parsed, then trigger event is exactly 'wo.transition.in_progress_to_completed'

## Test strategy
- RED: test asserting tolerance + override role + trigger event before YAML exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter dsl-rules test closed-production-strict-v1'

## Risk red lines
- Do not change tolerance from 0.02 without ADR (D3 lock)
- Do not allow override roles beyond production_manager
- Do not change trigger event name (consumers depend on it)
